titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Jay and Majory Kapenga Papers
titlestmt.author: Yarra Berger

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 19, 2024 at 22:00

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Jay and Marjory Kapenga Papers (RG 338), Special Collections, Yale Divinity Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: To be added.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence to/and from MUK during enrollment at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence organized by the family regarding missionary Ruth Young's leave from the Oman Mission in the 1950s.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence organized by the family regarding missionary Ruth Young's leave from the Oman Mission in the 1950s.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes materials related to annual meetings.

did.unittitle: "Life in Muscat," "The Kapenga Family," "Trip to Europe"
"Raps with the Kaps," Advice for new missionaries

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes drafted chapter and family note.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original order established by family kept intact.

did.unittitle: "That The Light May Shine," "A Shop on Maine Street," "Ya'Coub, Colporteur in Kuwait," "Those Crazy Missionaries," "A Team in Muscat," "On Religious Movies"
Thoughts on 'The Evangel', "Evangelism Today as I See It," "The Resurrection and Its Meaning," Essay on 'the origin of worship', Holland Classis meeting speech, "The Cross - A Symbol"
"Kuwait Church News-Notes," Graduation speech at Kodai school
"Arabic Sunday Service," "The Muscat Bookshop," "The Expatriate Church in Oman," "A Talk on Travel in the Old Days," "Old Days in Oman"
"Sayyid Said Bin Taimur Bin Faisal: Sultan of Muscat and Oman"
"Two Talks on the History of the English Speaking Protestant Church, Ruwi, Oman," American women's group speech
"Pastorate in Mission," Prayer for Penney Farms Church
"Here and There Around the Great Sea"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes for final paper.

did.unittitle: "The Psychological Basis for Expansions and other Emphases and Activities as I see it"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains several liturgical writings, including service in Oman with Arabic translation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original order organized by family kept intact.

did.unittitle: "Social Psychology Term Paper: The Case of Dody"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article written for publication "Neglected Arabia" #215.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Account used in weaving publication.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Retyped notes from daily journal.

did.unittitle: "Nothing at All: Hasidic Tales and Sufi Literature"
"Our Love Affair with Oman," "Old Oman," "Growing Up in the Muslim World"
"Marching to a Different Drum," "The Time of Apricots," "Ramadan," "Generations"
"Arabian Mission, Muscat, Oman 1893-1994," "What Does it Mean to be a Missionary in a Muslim Country?"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains publication written for the Church Herald while in retirement, as well as transcribed notes found on Marjory Kapenga's desk by her son, Peter.

did.unittitle: "A Journey of the Spirit: The Life and Poetry of Theodore Roethke"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence regarding final paper.

did.unittitle: "Real Singing is a Different Breath: Rainer Maria Rilke"
Letter to a magazine in response to an article about Jungian psychology and Hasidic Judaism

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied letter to an editor, contains additional handwritten commentary from Marjory's husband, Jay Kapenga.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains Marjory Kapenga's CV, a newspaper article about her first trip to the Middle East, answers to a missionary questionaire posed to her during retirement, recorded reflections, funeral program and written eulogy, published obituary, and photograph.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains program for ordination, a speech delivered at Jay and Marjory Kapenga's wedding, CV, newspaper articles, answers to missionary questionnaire completed during retirement, funeral program and transcript of memorial service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence that includes Kapenga family geneology report.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes excerpts from a statement by the Sultan of Oman from 1968 about financial improvements in the Middle East and the export of oil.
